notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The source directly states that Wan Guchou's killing move was personally improved by Star Constellation Immortal Venerable. This is a hidden fact - not publicly known knowledge. The narrator states it as truth. Those who know include Zhou Xiongxin, Wan Zihong (the two Heavenly Court immortals present), Star Constellation Immortal Venerable herself, and Wan Guchou. The player does not know this unless they have read this chapter.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes post-battle political maneuvering (讨房联盟, 万家 vs 房家, 天庭 involvement). No character's observed action clearly reveals a personal motive that can be inferred with one-step caution. 萧夜壶 searches a blessed land and complains - ambiguous. 万古愁 convenes a meeting - ambiguous. 王小二 is a prisoner with no agency shown. No clear observedMotive -> inferredMotive chain available.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
房家两名七转成员房东西、房安蕾战死掩护房睇长（ptr_4），万古愁复活击败房家并提议乘胜追击彻底铲除房家（ptr_7），房家面临覆灭危机。但ptr_33不存在于sourcePointerPool中，需修正。
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
